tma.t: abbr. tissue mineral analysis 组织矿物质分析; total material assets 总物质资产; total military assets 军事总资产

tmas.t: (tma 的复数) abbr. tissue mineral analysis 组织矿物质分析; total material assets 总物质资产; total military assets 军事总资产

tmc.t: abbr. 交通管制（Traffic Movement Control）；运输器材司令部（[美]陆军）（Transportation Material Command）

tmdl.t: abbr. total maximum daily load 总最大日负载

tmds.t: [医][=tetramethyl-disilazane]四甲基二硅氮烷，四甲基二硅氨

tme.t: abbr. 测温装置（Temperature Measuring Equipment）

tmesis.d:
n. The separation of the parts of a compound word by the
   intervention of one or more words; as, in what place soever, for
   whatsoever place.

tmh.t: thermomechanical hydraulic 热机水压的；tons per manhour 吨/人-小时

tmi.t: abbr. technical market index (TMI) 技术性市场指数

tml.t: abbr. 电视微波链路（Television Microwave Link）；四甲基铅（Tetramethyllead ）

tmm.t: abbr. transverse magnetic mode 横磁模; tunica muscularis mucosae 粘膜肌层; three migration model 三移动模型; tri-media module 三媒体模块

tmnt.t: abbr. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle 忍者龟

tmo.t: abbr. telegraph money order 电汇票

tmpgenc.t: n. 津波视像编码（一款编码软件）

tmr.t: abbr. timer 计时员; 定时器; 时间继电器; 秒表

tmv.d: n the widely studied plant virus that causes tobacco mosaic; it was the first virus discovered (1892)

tmw.t: abbr. thermal megawatts 热学兆瓦特; tomorrow 明天
